items.info: Saber's banner has been available since July 11, 2025 , in Phase 1 of Version 3.4. It doesn't have a fixed end date yet. Her Light Cone, A Thankless Coronation , is available at the same time through the .

items.label: Brilliant Fixation
items.info: Ashveil's banner will run from March 24, 2026 until April 21, 2026 (UTC-5). His signature Light Cone, The Finale of a Lie , will run at the same time through the banner.

items.label: Bygone Reminiscence
items.info: Hyacine's rerun banner will be available from March 24, 2026 until April 08, 2026 (UTC-5). Her Light Cone, Long May Rainbows Adorn the Sky , will also available through the banner.
